info.name: go-echo-template — Full Workspace (Zone 1-7)
info.description: ລວມທຸກ zone ເປັນ workspace ດຽວ. ຮັນ "0. Auth > Login" ກ່ອນສະເໝີ — token ຈະຖືກບັນທຶກໃສ່ collection variable `token` ອັດຕະໂນມັດ ແລ້ວ request ອື່ນທັງໝົດຈະໃຊ້ token ນັ້ນຕໍ່ (inherit ຈາກ collection-level bearer auth) ໂດຍບໍ່ຕ້ອງກັອບ token ໃສ່ເອງ.

item.name: 0. Auth (ຮັນກ່ອນສະເໝີ)

exec: console.warn("⚠️ no token found in login response");

item.name: Me (current user, ທົດສອບ token)
Update (PUT — ທັບທັງໝົດ)
Change status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/TRIAL) — ໃຊ້ແທນລົບ
Change status (ACTIVE/EXPIRED/CANCELLED) — ໃຊ້ແທນລົບ

body.raw:
{
  "product_id": 1,
  "variant_name": "ໄຊສ໌ M ສີດຳ",
  "sku_code": "TSHIRT-M-BLACK",
  "price": 89000,
  "cost_price": 50000,
  "weight_grams": 200
}

item.name: Create IN (ຮັບເຄື່ອງເຂົ້າສາງ)

body.raw:
{
  "product_variant_id": 1,
  "movement_type": "IN",
  "qty_change": 50,
  "ref_type": "purchase",
  "note": "ຮັບເຄື່ອງເຂົ້າສາງ"
}

item.name: Status -> COMPLETED (ຢືນຢັນຂາຍ)
Status -> EXPIRED (ຍົກເລີກການຈອງ)
Delete (ຈະລົ້ມເຫຼວຖ້າມີ orders)

body.raw:
{
  "customer_id": 1,
  "recipient_name": "ນາງ ສົມສະໄໝ",
  "phone": "02055555555",
  "address": "ບ້ານ ໂພນທັນ",
  "province": "ນະຄອນຫຼວງວຽງຈັນ"
}

item.name: Delete (ຖືກປະຕິເສດຖ້າ is_default)
Status -> PAID (ຫັກ stock ຈິງ)
Create (ອັບໂຫຼດສະລິບ)

body.raw:
{
  "shop_id": 1,
  "platform": "FACEBOOK_PAGE",
  "platform_account_id": "fbpage-12345",
  "account_name": "ຮ້ານທົດລອງ Page",
  "access_token": "SUPER-SECRET-TOKEN"
}

item.name: Send staff reply (ບໍ່ນັບ unread)
Create (ຈຳລອງ webhook ເຂົ້າມາ)
Create (ປັກໝຸດສິນຄ້າ)
Create (ຈຳລອງ comment ເຂົ້າມາ)
4. Comment Intents (ຢືນຢັນ CF)
Create — CF_SUCCESS (ມີ product+qty, stock ພຽງພໍ)
Create — INVALID_CODE (ບໍ່ມີ product ຈັບຄູ່)
